content:
3. How should we scaffold the final class-wide event with XP integration?

✔ XP can be spent to gain advantages in an Olympic-style literary event.
✔ Students bid XP to choose categories or alter the rules of engagement.
✔ Mastery Exam Champions gain special event privileges (e.g., “judge” status).

🚀 Version 4.9 now integrates all skill-based mastery elements, class POV shifts, literary world-building, and final retribution mechanics.
🔥 Are we locking this in? 🎮📖

📌 Version 5.0 – FINAL REVISION: The Rule of Three, Hero’s Journey Structure, Expanded Canterbury Tales “Indulgences” Section, & Mastery Exam Integration


🚀 This revision ensures every class structure, title, character path, and reference follows the rule of three, incorporates the Hero’s Journey, expands comedic elements, and refines XP-based decision-making.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 111 (chunk 111/555)
